title: A Review of Anthropic's Global Workspace Paper
summary: A Review of Anthropic's Global Workspace Paper
whyItMatters: The below is a public review Anthropic asked me to write for their new global workspace paper . I recommend at least skimming their paper first. TLDR : I think this is a fantastic paper - it presents compelling evidence for some kind of "cognitive space" in models, that is used as a "working memory" for intermediate variables during a forward pass, shows th…
